description: Run a Trivy vulnerability scan on the node and return the raw Trivy JSON report. Trivy must already be installed (e.g. via a Puppet class or Bolt install task).

scan_type.description: Trivy subcommand to run: rootfs (host OS packages), fs (a filesystem path), or image.

target.description: What Trivy scans. For rootfs/fs this is a path (default '/'); for image it is an image reference.

severities.description: Comma-separated severities to include, e.g. 'CRITICAL,HIGH,MEDIUM'. Empty means all.

trivy_path.description: Absolute path to the trivy binary if it is not on PATH.
